column1: ajñāna-timirāndhasya jñānāñjana-śalākayā | cakṣur-unmīlitaṁ yena tasmai śrī gurave namaḥ ||
column2: ajnana-timirandhasya jnananjana-shalakaya caksur-unmilitam yena tasmai sri gurave namah

column3: as a description, not as a name
as chapter in the Bhagavad Gītā
as energetic point in the subtle body

column1: he kṛṣṇa karuṇā-sindhu dīna-bandhu jagat-pate | gopeśa gopikā-kānta rādhā-kānta namo ’stu te ||
column2: he krishna karuna-sindhu dina-bandhu jagat-pate gopesha gopika-kanta radha-kanta namo 'stu te

column4: a term of Vedānta meaning method or path

column1: karāgre vasate lakṣmīḥ kara-madhye sarasvatī kara-mūle tu govindaḥ prabhāte kara-darśanam
column2: karagre vasate lakshmih kara-madhye sarasvati kara-mule tu govindah prabhate kara-darshanam

column1: manmanā bhava mad-bhakto mad yājī māṁ namas kuru | mām evaiṣyasi satyaṁ te pratijāne priyo’si me ||
column2: manmana bhava mad-bhakto mad yaji mam namas kuru mam evaishyasi satyan te pratijane priyo’si me

column1: namāmi nārāyaṇa-pāda-paṅkajaṁ karomi nārāyaṇa-pūjanaṁ sadā | vadāmi nārāyaṇa-nāma nirmalaṁ smarāmi nārāyaṇa-tattvam avyayam ||
column2: namami narayana-pada-pankajam karomi narayana-pujanam sada vadami narayana-nama nirmalaṁ smarami narayana-tattvam avyayam

column1: oṁ bhūr bhuvaḥ svaḥ tat savitur vareṇyaṃ bhargo devasya dhīmahi dhiyo yo naḥ pracodayāt
column2: om bhur bhuva svaha tat savitur varenyam bhargo devasya dhimahi dhiyo yo nah pracodayat

column1: oṁ mahāvatārāya vidmahe jagadgurudevāya dhīmahi tanno bābājī pracodayāt
column2: om mahavataraya vidmahe jagadgurudevaya dhimahi tanno babaji pracodayat

column1: oṁ paramahaṁsa śrī svāmī viśvānandāya namaḥ
column2: om paramahamsa sri svami vishwanandaya namah

column1: oṁ premāvatārāya vidmahe sadgurudevāya dhīmahi tanno viśvānandaḥ pracodayāt
column2: om premavataraya vidmahe sadgurudevaya dhimahi tanno vishvananda pracodayat

column3: when referring to Caitanya, Nityānanda, Advaitācārya and their associates
when referring to the five elements of prakṛti
02.02.24 when referring to the title outside of a particular name
in context of BM spiritual order

column1: sarva dharmān parityajya mām ekaṁ śaraṇaṁ vraja | ahaṁ tvā sarva-pāpebhyo mokṣayiṣyāmi mā śucaḥ ||
column2: sarva dharman parityajya mam ekam sharanam vraja | aham tva sarva-papebhyo mokshayishyami ma shucah ||

column3: as instruction in a general context

column1: śrīman nārāyaṇa caraṇau śaraṇaṁ prapadye śrīmate nārāyaṇāya namaḥ
column2: sriman narayana charanau sharanam prapadye srimate narayanaya namah

column1: śrīmat parabrahma guruṁ smarāmi śrīmat parabrahma guruṁ vadāmi | śrīmat parabrahma guruṁ namāmi śrīmat parabrahma guruṁ bhajāmi ||
column2: srimat parabrahma gurum smarami srimat parabrahma gurum vadami srimat parabrahma gurum namāmi srimat parabrahma gurum bhajami

column3: 02.02.24 when referring to the title outside of a particular name
in context of BM spiritual order

column1: tapta-kāñcana-gaurāṅgi rādhe vṛndāvaneśvari | vṛṣabhānu-sute devi praṇamāmi hari-priye ||
column2: tapta-kancana-gaurangi radhe vrindavanesvari vrishabhanu-sute devi pranamami hari-priye

column1: vāñchā-kalpatarūbhayaś ca kṛpā-sindhubhya eva ca patitanāṁ pāvanebhyo vaiṣṇavebhyo namo namaḥ
column2: vancha-kalpatarubhayash cha krpa-sindhubyah eva cha patitanam pavanebhyo vaishnavebhyo namo namah

column1: yā kundendu-tuṣāra-hāra-dhavalā yā śubhra-vastrāvṛtā yā vīṇā-vara-daṇḍa-maṇḍita-karā yā śveta-padmāsanā | yā brahmācyuta-śaṅkara-prabhṛtibhir-devaiḥ sadā vanditā sā māṁ pātu sarasvati bhagavati buddhi pradāṁ śārade ||
column2: ya kundendu-tushara-hara-dhavala ya shubhra-vastravrta ya vina-vara-danda-mandita-kara ya shveta-padmasana ya brahmacyuta-shankara-prabhrtibhir-devaih sada vandita sa mam patu sarasvati bhagavati buddhi pradam sharade
